chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-361 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. 7308/2025 2. For orders on M.A. 7309/2025 30.09.2025 Mr. Ali Ahmed @ Zaman Khan Patoli, Advocate for Petitioner ----- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Learned Counsel has filed this Application stating that the Petitioner may be allowed to withdraw instant Petition as the grievance of the Petitioner has been resolved. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the Petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
